mapper.select: SELECT REVIEW_NO, NO, GROUP_NO, REVIEW_TITLE, IMG_URL, CONTENT, VIEWS, COMMENTS, STAR, CATEGORY FROM REVIEW ORDER BY REVIEW_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW (REVIEW_NO, NO, GROUP_NO, REVIEW_TITLE, IMG_URL, CONTENT, STAR) VALUES (REVIEW_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 1, 1, #{title}, #{fileName}, #{content}, #{star})
INSERT INTO COMMENTS (COMMENTS_NO, NO, NICKNAME, REVIEW_NO, CONTENT) VALUES (COMMENTS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{userNickName}, #{reviewNo}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COMMENTS_NO, NO, NICKNAME, REVIEW_NO, CONTENT, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AS REG_DATE FROM COMMENTS ORDER BY COMMENTS_NO
